raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current focus","name":"How has the last couple of weeks felt from your side?","description":"Allows Taya to set the context for the conversation and surface any immediate concerns or highlights.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Workshop timing","name":"I've noticed workshops seem to be planned last minute — what's the situation there?","description":"Explores the reasons behind last-minute workshop planning to understand underlying issues.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Role clarity","name":"Is there anything about your role or expectations that's feeling unclear right now?","description":"Surfaces any ambiguity in Taya's role or expectations that might be causing stress.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy drivers","name":"What's been driving your energy or motivation lately?","description":"Examines factors contributing to Taya's current energy levels and motivation.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Workshop support","name":"What kind of support would make workshop planning or execution smoother for you?","description":"Identifies the support or resources Taya might need to improve workshop planning and execution.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Planning stressors","name":"Are there specific stressors in your workload that are impacting your planning?","description":"Investigates workload-related stressors that might be affecting Taya's planning abilities.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Priority alignment","name":"How aligned do you feel your current tasks are with your priorities?","description":"Assesses alignment between Taya's tasks and her perceived priorities, highlighting any disconnects.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next steps clarity","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to tackle to improve your planning process?","description":"Encourages Taya to identify a specific action to take towards improving her planning process.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
